description: Opus 4.7 Model Support - Replace Opus 4.6 with Opus 4.7 and add version numbers to model labels

userStories.title: Replace Opus 4.6 with Opus 4.7 in Claude provider variants
userStories.description: As a developer, I need the Claude provider to offer Opus 4.7 instead of Opus 4.6 so that new projects use the latest model.
acceptanceCriteria: MODEL_VARIANTS array in backend/src/providers/claude.ts contains 'claude-opus-4-7' instead of 'claude-opus-4-6'
New projects created with Claude provider default to 'claude-opus-4-7' (first entry in array)
Existing projects with 'claude-opus-4-6' in the database are NOT changed

userStories.title: Update variant labels to show version numbers
userStories.description: As a user, I want to see version numbers on model labels (e.g., 'Opus 4.7') so I know exactly which model version I'm using.
acceptanceCriteria: formatVariantLabel() in frontend/src/pages/Models.tsx returns version-suffixed labels
formatVariantLabel() in frontend/src/pages/Dashboard.tsx returns version-suffixed labels
Label mapping: claude-opus-4-7 -> 'Opus 4.7', claude-opus-4-6 -> 'Opus 4.6', claude-sonnet-4-6 -> 'Sonnet 4.6', claude-haiku-4-5-20251001 -> 'Haiku 4.5'
Custom/unknown model variants fall back to displaying the raw variant string
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
